description: Costco product search results (experimental — MUI-based DOM, containers may be unreliable)

_notes.domStructure: Costco uses MUI components with generated class names. MuiCard-root returned 0 matches during probing. Product links (a[href*='.product.']) are the most reliable anchor. Title and price are in sibling spans within parent MuiBox-root divs. The textAll on span captures all text fragments which include title, price like '$16.99', and review count like '(573)'. Post-processing required to separate fields.
_notes.fallback: If container returns 0 matches or fields are empty, raw text fallback is recommended
